SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:CreatePrDialog.kt$CreatePrDialog$/** Canonical list of selected reviewers by username — this is what the Bitbucket * create-PR payload sends. Display names are tracked separately so we can keep the * API contract while rendering friendly labels. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:CreatePrDialog.kt$CreatePrDialog$/** Incremented on every module change and generation start to detect write-after-cancel races. */

SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:CreatePrDialog.kt$CreatePrDialog$/** username → "Display Name" for rendering. Populated from the user-search dropdown and * from repo-level default reviewers (both return full `BitbucketUser`). Settings-based * defaults only give us a username, so those chips fall back to the raw username. */

SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:CreatePrDialog.kt$CreatePrDialog$/** username → chip component for chips that came from the current repo's Bitbucket defaults. * Used by [onModuleChanged] to swap repo-level chips without touching manual additions. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:PrDashboardPanel.kt$PrDashboardPanel$/** Suppresses toggle action listeners during programmatic toggle switches. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:PrDetailPanel.kt$PrDetailPanel$/** Lazily created / replaced each time a new PR is loaded. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:PrDetailPanel.kt$PrDetailPanel$/** Shared client cache — reuses HTTP connections across all IO calls in this panel (ARC-2 fix). */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:PrListPanel.kt$PrListPanel$/** Called when the user clicks the "Refresh" action link in the empty state. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:PrListPanel.kt$PrListPanel$/** When true, repo badge is shown on each PR row (set by dashboard when multiple repos configured) */

UnusedPrivateMember:BitbucketServiceImplListPrCommentsPaginationTest.kt$BitbucketServiceImplListPrCommentsPaginationTest$private fun emptyActivitiesPage(isLastPage: Boolean, nextPageStart: Int? = null): String

UnusedPrivateProperty:PrListService.kt$PrListService$val username = cachedUsername ?: ConnectionSettings.getInstance().state.bitbucketUsername.takeIf { it.isNotBlank() } ?: run { val result = client.getCurrentUsername() if (result is ApiResult.Success && result.data.isNotBlank()) { cachedUsername = result.data // D2: PersistentStateComponent state must mutate on EDT to avoid corrupt // XML persistence and missed StateChanged notifications. Previously this // ran on Dispatchers.IO (audit finding pullrequest:F-3). withContext(Dispatchers.EDT) { connSettings.bitbucketUsername = result.data } log.info("[PR:List] Auto-detected Bitbucket username: ${result.data}") result.data } else { log.warn("[PR:List] Could not detect username — PR list may not filter correctly") null } }

Wrapping:BitbucketServiceImpl.kt$BitbucketServiceImpl$(data, buildString { append("PR #$prId merge status: ") append(if (data.canMerge) "CAN merge" else "CANNOT merge") if (data.conflicted) append(" (CONFLICTED)") if (data.vetoes.isNotEmpty()) append("\nVetoes: ${data.vetoes.joinToString("; ")}") })

Wrapping:CreatePrDialog.kt$CreatePrDialog$(JBLabel(labelText).apply { toolTipText = labelText // Fixed preferred/max size so long labels get clipped instead of growing // the column. Tooltip shows the full label on hover. val h = preferredSize.height preferredSize = Dimension(inputColumnWidth, h) maximumSize = Dimension(inputColumnWidth, h) }, col1Gbc)

Wrapping:PrDetailPanel.kt$PrDetailPanel$(JBLabel("Select a pull request to view details.").apply { foreground = JBUI.CurrentTheme.Label.disabledForeground() horizontalAlignment = SwingConstants.CENTER verticalAlignment = SwingConstants.CENTER }, BorderLayout.CENTER)
